---
applyTo: 'client/src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}'
---

# Frontend Instructions

- Use approved palette tokens only (`emerald`, `sage`, `mint`, `lavender`, `calm-blue`, `cream`, `grey-soft`, `grey-deep`).
- Avoid default Tailwind color scales for primary UI styling.
- Keep first-person practitioner voice and empathetic tone.
- CTA wording should remain gentle and non-commanding.
- Keep `CrisisFooter` visible on every route (including 404), above footer.
- Do not add client-side Firestore SDK access.
- Keep accessibility high (semantic landmarks, descriptive labels, reduced-motion support).
